llvm::AttributeImpl Class Reference

This class represents a single, uniqued attribute. That attribute could be a single enum, a tuple, or a string. More...

Protected Member Functions

 AttributeImpl (AttrEntryKind KindID)

Detailed Description

This class represents a single, uniqued attribute. That attribute could be a single enum, a tuple, or a string.
